title: Talent Acquisition Executive
description:
About MCI Career Services

A cornerstone of the MCI Group of Companies, MCI Career Services Pte Ltd is a premier provider of holistic HR solutions. From permanent placements to payroll outsourcing, we support diverse industries across Singapore.

Elevate Your Career with MCI Career Services

Are you passionate about people and driven by results? At MCI, we do more than fill vacancies—we bridge the gap between ambition and opportunity. If you thrive in a high-energy environment, you’ve found your next home.

Why Choose MCI?

  • Uncapped Commissions

  • Comprehensive Growth: No recruitment experience? No problem. We provide the training you need to master the craft.

  • Powerhouse Support: You aren’t a lone wolf; our dedicated Business Development and Talent Acquisition teams are here to back you up.

  • Vibrant Culture: Join a fast-paced, supportive, and rewarding team environment.

The Perks

  • Monthly Performance Commission

  • Bi-annual Merit-Based Increments

  • Exclusive Incentive Trips

  • Collaborative Ecosystem

Key Responsibilities

  • From initial screening to shortlisting, you will manage the end-to-end selection process to match the right talent with the right role.

  • Serve as a dedicated representative by maintaining clear communication with applicants and delivering a seamless, high-quality recruitment journey

  • Partner with our Business Development team to understand client needs and provide expert guidance on selection strategies.

  • Maintain meticulous records and ensure all recruitment practices align strictly with guidelines and employment laws.

  • Drive continuous improvement by gathering candidate feedback and refining our recruitment workflows.

Who We Are Looking For

  • Minimum Diploma holder (Open to all disciplines; HR or Business preferred).

  • Strong organizational skills with a keen eye for detail.

  • An eagerness to learn the ropes of recruitment and a drive to succeed in a sales-oriented landscape.

  • A proactive approach to meeting and exceeding performance targets.

Applicants who possess relevant experience for the above responsibilities are most welcome to apply. If you do not possess the above experience, your application will still be considered on individual merits and you may be contacted for other opportunities.

Please submit your updated resume in MS Words format by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON.

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you give consent to collection, use and disclosure of your personal data and/or resume by the company (or its agent) for the purpose of the processing and administration by the company relating to this job application.

https://www.mci.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/MCI-Job-Applicant-Data-Protection-Notice.pdf

**We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

Emerson Berido Yap

Registration Number: R25157563
EA Licence No: 06C2859 (MCI Career Services Pte Ltd)
